basic_details.job_title: DHS South Andaman Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society South Andaman (DHS South Andaman) Pharmacist Notification 2026 has been released on 17-05-2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DHS South Andaman Pharmacist Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged minimum 18 years who have XIIth Std. with Science subjects along with Degree/Diploma in Homoeopathic Pharmacy or Certificate Course in Homoeopathic Pharmacy with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Pharmacist vacancies. The walk-in process for DHS South Andaman Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 27-05-2026. Ca

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: XIIth Std. (Senior School Certificate Examination) with Science subjects from a recognized Board/Institution., Degree/Diploma in Homoeopathic Pharmacy
qualification.details: XIIth Std. (Senior School Certificate Examination) with Science subjects from a recognized Board/Institution. Degree/Diploma in Homoeopathic Pharmacy or its equivalent with the essential subjects like Homoeopathic Pharmacy, Homoeopathic Materis Medics and Organon of Medicine form a recognized Institution. (OR) Certificate Course in Homoeopathic Pharmacy from a recognized Institution with a minimum of 03 to 05 years experience of dispensing Homoeo Medicine in a recognized Hospital or Dispensary. Desirable: Experience in dispensing Homoeo Dispensary.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DHS South Andaman Pharmacist (Homoeo) recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Pharmacist (Homoeo) post is scheduled for 27th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time for registration and the interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Pharmacist (Homoeo) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed XIIth Std. with Science subjects and possess a Degree/Diploma in Homoeopathic Pharmacy or a Certificate Course in Homoeopathic Pharmacy with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Pharmacist (Homoeo) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,632/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum age requirement for the Pharmacist (Homoeo) post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for candidates applying for the Pharmacist (Homoeo) post is 18 years.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of relevant certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Educational Qualification, Experience, and a personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Sri Vijaya Puram, South Andaman, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, with pincode 744101.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Pharmacist (Homoeo) post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.No. M/115/2023-District Health Society (SA).
